disclaimer: Ranges are Nash/GTO approximations for study purposes. Verify with professional solvers (GTO Wizard, PioSolver) for critical decisions.

position_notes.UTG: Under the Gun โ€” earliest position, tightest range
position_notes.MP: Middle Position โ€” tight but wider than UTG
position_notes.LJ: Lojack โ€” one off hijack, moderate opening
position_notes.HJ: Hijack โ€” two off button, opens wider
position_notes.CO: Cutoff โ€” just before button, wide opens
position_notes.BTN: Button โ€” widest opens, best position postflop
position_notes.SB: Small Blind โ€” first to act postflop, aggressive pre
position_notes.BB: Big Blind โ€” defends wide vs late position opens

5BB_BTN_RFI.notes: BTN shoves any pair, any ace, wide suited connectors ~52%

5BB_SB_RFI.notes: SB vs BB shoves ~48%, slightly tighter than BTN
